input_dict.question: Who won the 2016 Russian national silver medal with another Russian ice dancer born 29 April 1995?
input_dict.source_summary:
Primary topic: Victoria Sinitsina — 2016 Russian national silver (ice dancing).  
Nikita Katsalapov is a Russian ice dancer born 10 July 1991.  
Nikita Katsalapov partnered with Victoria Sinitsina to win the 2016 Russian national silver medal.
input_dict.target_summary:
Integrated evidence summary:
- Victoria Alexandrovna Sinitsina — born 29 April 1995 (Victoria Sinitsina).
- Nikita Gennadyevich Katsalapov — born 10 July 1991 (Nikita Katsalapov).
- With Victoria Sinitsina, Nikita Katsalapov is stated as the 2016 Russian national silver medalist.
These facts link the 29 April 1995 ice dancer (Victoria Sinitsina) to the 2016 Russian national silver medal and identify her partner (Nikita Katsalapov) as the co-recipient of that medal.
